[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100000 2
1 0010000 1
2 0110000 2
3 0001111 4
4 0100010 2
5 0011111 5
6 1101110 5
7 0011011 4

01 10 0011111 5 match 5
12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1111111 a
34 43 1111111 a
45 54 1111111 a
56 65 0110010 3
67 76 1110110 5
70 07 1010110 4

02 20 1111110 6
13 31 0011111 5 match 5
24 42 1101111 6
35 53 0111011 5
46 64 1111111 a
57 75 1110110 5
60 06 0110010 3
71 17 1011111 6

14 41 1111111 a
25 52 1111110 6

47 74 1101111 6
50 05 0110010 3
61 16 0111111 6
72 27 1101110 5 match 6

04 40 1111111 a
15 51 0111111 6
26 62 1111110 6
37 73 1011111 6
